nasb.text: When it was told Saul, he sent other messengers, and they also prophesied. So Saul sent messengers again the third time, and they also prophesied.

esv.text: When it was told Saul, he sent other messengers, and they also prophesied. And Saul sent messengers again the third time, and they also prophesied.

cnv.text: 有人把這事告訴了掃羅，他就再派別的人去，這些人也受感說話。掃羅第三次派人去，他們也受感說話。

ccb.text: 扫罗听说后又派人去，派去的人也说起预言来。扫罗第三次派人去，派去的人同样说起预言来。
